import httpx
from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware
from starlette.requests import Request
from starlette.responses import JSONResponse

auth_client = httpx.AsyncClient(base_url="https://auth.internal")
telemetry_client = httpx.AsyncClient(base_url="https://telemetry.internal")


class AuthMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        token = request.headers.get("Authorization", "")
        resp = await auth_client.get("/verify", headers={"Authorization": token})

        if resp.status_code != 200:
            return JSONResponse({"error": "Unauthorized"}, status_code=401)

        response = await call_next(request)
        return response


class TelemetryMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        await telemetry_client.post(
            "/events",
            json={"path": request.url.path, "method": request.method},
        )

        response = await call_next(request)
        return response
